    D

    David - Class in RestaurantGame
     
    David() - Constructor for class RestaurantGame.David
    Constructor that creates a David customer with predefined attributes.
    DavidTest() - Method in class Unit_Tests.customerTest
     
    day - Variable in class RestaurantGame.Player
     
    dayMilestones - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    ArrayList of Strings for the day's milestones
    dayOver() - Method in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    Returns whether the day is over.
    daysAccuracy - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    integer of the accuracy for given day
    daysCustomers - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    A Queue of Customers that holds the customers of the Restaurant on this day
    daysIncome - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    double of income for given day
    daysIngredients - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    An ArrayList of Toppings that corresponds to the Toppings needed to build this day's burgers
    daysScore - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    integer of score for given day
    daysTest() - Method in class Unit_Tests.PlayerTest
     
    daysTiming - Variable in class RestaurantGame.RestaurantModel
    integer of timing for given day
